description: The FireOnLocalFalse node will listen for changes on its input bool and fire an impulse whenever the input turns from True to False across updates.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* FireOnFalse for the non-local equivalent of this node where a user to fire the impulse on can be specified.
* FireOnLocalTrue
* FireOnLocalChange

ProtoFlux:Flow
Listener nodes
